title: utility trio (node, 3 independent units — branch/skip isolation)
goal: I want three small helpers I can use from a command window, all kept in one project but each doing its own separate job: one that turns a messy phrase into a clean web-address-style name, one that converts between everyday units (at least miles and kilometres, and pounds and kilograms), and one that makes up a strong random password of whatever length I ask for. Each helper should work entirely on its own — none of them needs the others.

expected_outcome.notes: Proves parallel independent branches + skip isolation: zero dependency edges, so a park in one unit must never skip or block the other two, and the report must credit the delivered branches while ending job-NOT-done honestly if any unit is missing.
